title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE SUM OF ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND PESOS AS A GRANT TO MRS. LUZ B. MAGSAYSAY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6938 / 53 OG No. 18, 5948 (September 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1817, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE SUM OF ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND PESOS AS A GRANT TO MRS. LUZ B. MAGSAYSAY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sum of one hundred thousand pesos is appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, as a grant to Mrs. Luz B. Magsaysay, widow of the late President Ramon Magsaysay. This amount shall be tax exempt.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
